query:
ALTER TABLE professors 
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS email,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS bio,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS personal_website,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS lab_website,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS lab_name,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS source_url,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS accepting_students,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS university_id,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS major_name;
